'''鈭歵-w-dh-g''' ('''katawdhegoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:turmoil|turmoil]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-w-dh-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:turmoil|turmoil]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵-w-dh-g
|-
! Lemma
| katawdhegoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitawdhegoko|thitawdhegoko]] || [[word:jitawdhegoko|jitawdhegoko]] || [[word:shitawdhegoko|shitawdhegoko]] || [[word:kitawdhegoko|kitawdhegoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatawdhegoko|thatawdhegoko]] || [[word:jatawdhegoko|jatawdhegoko]] || [[word:shatawdhegoko|shatawdhegoko]] || [[word:katawdhegoko|katawdhegoko]]
|-

|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
